english translation text: Karbala yeh bata mera bhaiyya kaha hai gaya“O Karbala, tell me, where has my brother gone“ English Transliteration
“O Karbala, tell me, where has my brother gone"

urdu transliteration text:
Bibi zainab ne Abbas ko kiya maqtal mein jaake gilaTum Bhi darya  pe jaa sogaye ab mera kown hai aasra,Aa Bhi jaa ghaziyaan dukhi zainab ka Parda bana
Bibi Zainab said to Abbas on the battefield,
O’ Ghazi, come and save Zainab's veil
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
You have also gone to sleep by the river,
Now who will give me hope,

The veils of the family have been snatched away,
Come and see the shackles around Sajjad's neck that the cruel men have put,
Now it just the family of Muhammad(s) and saddle-less camels.

When the caravan of captives passed through the bazaar of Kufa,
Zainab didn’t even have her veil to protect herself
